ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion within the region */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "health_system_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the country's health system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for this data entry */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the health data was reported */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Total cases reported */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths reported */,
  "critical" INTEGER /* Total critical cases */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Total tests conducted */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this entry */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU cases */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Flag indicating the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source organization */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, hospital, NGO) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health data entry for this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL where the report can be accessed */,
  "report_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES health_data ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data entry accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES health_data ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator (e.g., cases per million) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the health indicator */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the indicator data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_data" (
  "indicator_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for this indicator value */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the value was reported */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the indicator value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for this indicator value */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Flag indicating the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the data entry is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the quality checks */,
  "check_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES health_data ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_check_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("check_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country related to the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., outbreak, data anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_response" TEXT /* Response actions taken for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country implementing the policy */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was enacted */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the health policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., travel ban, vaccination mandate) */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy */,
  "policy_effectiveness" INTEGER /* Score indicating the effectiveness of the policy */,
  "policy_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the policy on health outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact study */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country related to the study */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date the study was conducted */,
  "study_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study's findings */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study */,
  "study_funding" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_publication" TEXT /* URL where the study can be accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_studies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
